evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having multiple time slots per day for the tour. However, the evidence only confirms two specific time slots (10am and 2pm) without any indication of additional slots being available. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not support the existence of multiple time slots beyond the two provided.
gaps: Only two time slots (10am and 2pm) are provided, failing to demonstrate multiple time slots per day.
